query:
SELECT 
  'Total Customers' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM customers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Customers with Building ID', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE buildingId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Unique Building IDs', COUNT(DISTINCT buildingId) FROM customers WHERE buildingId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Customers with Field Manager', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE fieldManager IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Unique Field Managers', COUNT(DISTINCT fieldManager) FROM customers WHERE fieldManager IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Workers', COUNT(*) FROM workers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Field Manager Workers', COUNT(*) FROM workers WHERE name NOT IN ('Admin User');
